title: Maddie's Building Tweaks
description: Tweaks to make your builds prettier and building easier.
body:
# Maddie's Building Tweaks
This is a building mod made with the philosophy that nothing that you build should be destroyed if it is removed.

[![Avaliable for Quilt Loader](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/raw/v2/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_64h.png)](https://quiltmc.org/en/)
[![Requires Quilt Standard Libraries](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/raw/v2/assets/cozy/requires/quilt-standard-libraries_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)

## Features

### Multi-flowers (Versions >= 1.0.0)
Allows you to place up to four of the same type of flower(Including Modded Flowers) in a single block for decoration and adds the ability to place flowers in a rotated. Makes flowers more renewable by allowing you to bonemeal them.

Works with flowers added by mods. You can prevent the bonemealing of certain flowers through the use of the ```building tweaks:no_bonemeal``` tag (Botania flowers are already included).

![Demonstration of Placing Flowers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ItsMaddieNow/Building-Tweaks/main/assets/Multi-Placing-Small-1.0.0.webp)
![Demonstration of Bonemealing Flowers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ItsMaddieNow/Building-Tweaks/main/assets/Bonemeal-1.0-Small.webp)
![Demonstration of Placing Flowers in Different Orientations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ItsMaddieNow/Building-Tweaks/main/assets/Oriented-Placing-Small-1.0.0.webp)

### Multiple Flowers in Pots (Versions >= 0.1.0)
Makes it possible to place up to five of one type of flower in a pot.

![Demonstration of Placing Multiple Flowers in a Single Pot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ItsMaddieNow/Building-Tweaks/main/assets/Potted-Placing-0.1.0.webp)

<details><summary>Old Versions</summary>

### Multi-flowers Pre 1.0.0
Allows you to place up to four of the same type of flower(Including Modded Flowers) in a single block.

![Demonstration of Placing Flowers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ItsMaddieNow/Building-Tweaks/main/assets/Flower-Demo-Small.webp)
![Demonstration of Bonemealing Flowers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ItsMaddieNow/Building-Tweaks/main/assets/Bonemeal-Demo-Small.webp)

</details>

### More Coming Soon
Submit Requests [Here](https://github.com/ItsMaddieNow/Building-Tweaks/issues/new?assignees=ItsMaddieNow&labels=enhancement&projects=&template=feature_request.md&title=%5BFEATURE%5D+...)
